demographics.living_situation: lives with a parent; parent is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest feels like it's being crushed and I can't stop crying — this huge wave of terror and grief just hit me out of nowhere and I feel like I'm not really here. Nothing actually happened to me today. Please help.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight while I was watching a documentary about what my family and ancestors went through. My chest went really tight, my heart is pounding, I'm breathing too fast, and I feel disconnected from the room.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly tonight, within minutes of watching a historical documentary
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour so far, still going
symptom_narrative.character: a crushing, tight pressure across the middle of my chest, a pounding racing heart, breathing too fast, uncontrollable crying, and a feeling of not being connected to what's around me
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst wave of panic and grief I've ever felt
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the middle of my chest and across my shoulders
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on fast and hasn't settled down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about the documentary and my family's history makes it surge again
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: shaky, sweaty, and I can't stand up steadily
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had long waves of anxiety and a heavy, grief-like feeling for years, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't really stand or talk clearly right now because I'm crying and breathing too fast

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing anxiety and a heavy, grief-like feeling I've carried for years

family_history_as_reported.narrative: my parent says these heavy, anxious feelings run in our family and seem to get passed down; there's also a deep mistrust of doctors and government in our family

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I was watching a documentary tonight about historical events my ancestors lived through and it hit me hard. I feel a strong pull to help my community and I worry a lot about future generations. My parent is here with me. My family is wary of medical and government services.

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding and racing
sitting on the floor, rocking slightly, clutching the chest, crying heavily and breathing fast
parent reports they can't stand steadily, are very distressed and hyperventilating, and keep saying they feel disconnected from the room
television is paused on a documentary about historical events
